demos.title: Hello World Test
demos.teaches: Write your first Vitest unit test. Understand describe/it blocks, assertions with expect, and beforeEach setup. Test a plain TypeScript class without Angular.

demos.title: Test Pipe
demos.teaches: Unit test Angular pipes in isolation by instantiating the pipe class directly and asserting transform output.

demos.title: Test Directive
demos.teaches: Test attribute directives by creating a host component in TestBed and asserting DOM changes caused by the directive.

demos.title: Service HTTP Test
demos.teaches: Test CustomersService CRUD operations using HttpTestingController. Flush mock responses and verify request URLs, methods, and body payloads for GET, POST, PUT and DELETE.

demos.title: httpResource Test
demos.teaches: Test a component that uses Angular's httpResource() for reactive data fetching. Use HttpTestingController to flush responses and assert loading state and rendered output.

demos.title: Comp Spy Customers
demos.teaches: Test CustomersComponent by providing a mock customersStore signal object. Use vi.fn() spies to assert that store methods are called correctly when component methods fire.

demos.title: Comp DOM Test
demos.teaches: Test CustomersTableComponent DOM output using setInput() for signal inputs. Query mat-row and mat-cell elements to verify rendered customer data and progress bar visibility.

demos.title: Comp Interaction Customers
demos.teaches: Test CustomersComponent interactions end-to-end. Emit events from child presenter and assert that the container calls the correct store methods.

demos.title: CRUD Customers
demos.teaches: Test SimpleCustomersComponent which uses Angular's resource() API for data loading. Spy on CustomersService to control HTTP responses and verify add/delete interactions.

demos.title: Input Signals & Outputs
demos.teaches: Test CustomerEditComponent using fixture.componentRef.setInput() to set required signal inputs. Verify that save and cancel outputs emit the correct values.

demos.title: Material Harness
demos.teaches: Test CustomersTableComponent using Angular Material test harnesses (MatTableHarness, MatButtonHarness). Interact with Material elements without coupling to DOM internals.

demos.title: Comp Async Customers
demos.teaches: Test asynchronous loading in CustomersComponent using fakeAsync/tick. Verify that progress bar appears while loading and rows render after data arrives.

demos.title: Container / Presenter
demos.teaches: Integration-test CustomersComponent (container) with real CustomersTableComponent and CustomerEditComponent (presenters). Verify signal data flow and output wiring across the tree.

demos.title: Mock Signal Store
demos.teaches: Mock the markdownEditorStore in component tests by providing a fake store object with signal properties. Assert component behaviour based on controlled signal values.

demos.title: Test Signal Store
demos.teaches: Test the markdownEditorStore directly by dispatching events via the Dispatcher. Verify state transitions for fetch, save, delete, and loadContent event flows.

demos.title: Simple Service
demos.teaches: Test a service class without DI by instantiating it directly. Verify add, delete and clear methods and state mutations in isolation.

demos.title: Class-Only Test
demos.teaches: Test component signal state by instantiating the class directly without TestBed. Fast and simple for pure logic tests that do not need the DOM.

demos.title: Material Async
demos.teaches: Combine Material test harnesses with async/await to interact with Material components that have asynchronous rendering.

demos.title: Playwright E2E
demos.teaches: Write end-to-end tests with Playwright using the Page Object Model and fixtures. Reset API state between tests for full isolation.

markdownItems.title: Key Concepts for httpResource Testing
markdownItems.comment: httpResource() uses HttpClient internally so HttpTestingController works the same way

markdownItems.title: Flushing Responses
markdownItems.comment: Call fixture.detectChanges() first to trigger the resource request, then flush with httpMock.expectOne()

comments.title: Using @ngrx/store
comments.comment: To use @ngrx/store, we need to install it first.

comments.title: Optimizing change detection
comments.comment: In order to optimize change detection, we need to use OnPush strategy.
